query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as animals_with_purchase_cost,
  SUM(purchaseCost) as total_purchase_cost,
  AVG(purchaseCost) as avg_purchase_cost,
  MIN(purchaseCost) as min_cost,
  MAX(purchaseCost) as max_cost
FROM animals WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND purchaseCost IS NOT NULL AND purchaseCost > 0;
